name: Kusari
description: Kusari — Open-source software supply chain security platform generating and verifying SBOM provenance metadata.

seo.title: Kusari — Compliance Automation
seo.meta_description: Kusari: Kusari — Open-source software supply chain security platform generating and verifying SBOM provenance metadata.

when_to_use: SBOM generation and signing for software supply chain
SLSA provenance attestation for CI/CD pipeline artifacts
Open-source dependency integrity verification via GUAC
Supply chain risk scoring for enterprise vendor assessment
Software attestation for NIST SSDF and EO 14028 compliance

pros: Open-source foundation for SBOM and provenance
Verifies SLSA provenance of build artifacts
Supply chain visibility across CI/CD pipelines
Aligned with emerging US federal SBOM requirements
cons: Early-stage product with evolving feature set
Requires engineering effort to integrate into pipelines
Smaller team and community than OSS security incumbents
Business model and pricing still maturing
review.verdict: Interesting bet for supply-chain-security teams who like open source — not a plug-and-play GRC purchase.
review.best_for: Platform teams building secure software supply chains from scratch
review.not_for: Compliance buyers who want a turnkey SOC 2 or FedRAMP tool
